features: The bolsius Rustik ball candle in the light grey colour sand grey has a diameter of 7.6 cm and burns for up to 25 hours.

Quality candles can be recognised by a long burning time, and they also retain their shape when removed. The bolsius rustic candle with rustic finish does not smoke or drip. Made with respect for man and planet. Free from palm oil, with natural plant wax from Europe. The braided cotton wick provides a quiet and stable flame. When burning, there is no black smoke, no soot or smoke, the candle burns quietly and cleanly.
The bolsius Rustik pillar candle has a long burning time and burns for up to 25 hours

Bolsius Candles have been manufactured since 1870. We use only the best raw materials for the production of quality candles. Each bolsius candle is made in Europe with professional skill and in a sustainable way. bolsius candles do not soot, and when you burn the candles, there are no smoke or smoke. The rustic candles from bolsius retain their shape when burning; in addition, the fan, i.e. the candle wick, is made of cotton and braided so that you always have a stable flame.
Longer burning time with natural and vegetable wax, no animal fats, no palm oil, rustic finish, perfect flame up to 25 hours, clean burning
description: Product Description Make every moment special. The natural light of candles provides warmth and mood in the house, make yourself cosy and relax. The bolsius rustic ball candles in the light grey colour sand grey have a diameter of 7.6 cm, do not drip and burn for up to 25 hours. Made with respect for people and nature, without palm oil and with natural plant wax. Thanks to cotton wick, always a perfect flame that does not blacken or smoke. Safety Warning Place the product in a safe place, away from flammable materials and protected from direct sunlight. Use a sturdy coaster or candle plate and ensure that the candle cannot tip over. For a candle arrangement with multiple candles, make sure they have a minimum distance of 10 cm apart so that they do not deform due to the heat. Pull the wick straight and upright before lighting it and use a candle snuffer to extinguish. This prevents unsightly wax splashes.

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Please follow the safety instructions provided for use and maintenance of the product.
